_comment: Synthetic incident-bridge meeting recaps + transcript excerpts + action items for the Atlas payments Sev-1 outage (2026-06-11). MTG-002 is the FIRST bridge call (10:00), MTG-001 is the LAST/latest bridge call (14:00) referenced by 'last bridge call' questions. MTG-003 is a restricted exec briefing. action_items carry their own ids, owners (people ids), due times, status.

meetings.title: Atlas Incident Bridge Call #1
meetings.recap: First incident bridge call (11-JUN 10:00). The bridge DECLARED a Sev-1 outage of the Atlas payments service after payment error rates spiked to 38%. Suspected root cause discussed: the v4.7 Atlas payments deploy introduced a connection-pool leak. Decision: prepare an immediate rollback of v4.7 to v4.6 and stand up a customer-comms workstream.
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Helen Cho: 'Declaring Sev-1 on Atlas payments — error rate is 38%.' Priya Nair: 'Strongly suspect the v4.7 deploy — connection-pool leak signature.' Marco Reyes: 'Roll back to v4.6 now; I'll own the bridge.'

action_items.text: Execute rollback of Atlas payments v4.7 to v4.6
Stand up customer-communications workstream for affected merchants

meetings.title: Atlas Incident Bridge Call #2 (latest)
meetings.recap: Latest incident bridge call (11-JUN 14:00) for the Atlas payments outage. The bridge DECIDED that the rollback to v4.6 is complete and the error rate has recovered to baseline; the incident moves to monitoring before all-clear. Actions assigned: continue monitoring the error rate for two hours, and confirm the customer-communications commitment to affected merchants. Root cause confirmed as the v4.7 connection-pool leak.
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Liam Foster: 'Rollback to v4.6 complete at 11:05, error rate back to baseline.' Marco Reyes: 'Good — we stay in monitoring for two hours before all-clear.' Helen Cho: 'Confirm the customer-comms commitment with Dana before we close.'

action_items.text: Monitor Atlas payments error rate for two hours and report before all-clear
Confirm and publish the customer-communications commitment to affected merchants

meetings.title: Atlas Outage — Executive Briefing (closed)
meetings.recap: Closed executive briefing on the Atlas payments outage. Reviewed commercial exposure and the confidential customer-communications commitment. (Restricted: exec-confidential.)
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Helen Cho: 'This commercial-impact number stays in this room.' Marco Reyes: 'Understood — exec-confidential.'

action_items.text: Prepare confidential commercial-impact summary for the executive team
